title: PM Workfront Read-Only Decision-History Panel
objective: Add a lazy, read-only PM disposition-history panel to the existing PM workfront row expansion by reusing the normalized decision-history read seam from PM Lane 005 and preserving return_to_lead as the only PM-clicked mutation action on the route.
required_inputs: PM Lane 005 normalized decision-history read contract
Focused backend, build, typecheck, and Playwright validation evidence
constrained_outputs: Operations-web PM workfront row expansion lazily reads GET /api/v1/reads/decision-history only when the PM opens or refreshes history
Decision-history panel filters locally by primary_blocking_issue_id, returnable_issue_id, last_pm_decision.entity_id, and blocking_issues[].id
Panel exposes action type, status transition, timestamp, actor role, and PM reason without coupling to full audit payloads or project-scope data
Focused Playwright proof asserts history read count, scoped row history rendering, unrelated history exclusion, no mutation from opening history, and unchanged PM-clicked return_to_lead request

No backend endpoint change, no new mutation endpoint, no SQL or schema migration, no service admission, no auth or ingress widening, no assignment mutation, no schedule mutation, and no autonomous AI business-state action
validation_steps: Run operations-web typecheck after build-generated Next types are available
Run focused Playwright browser smoke for the PM workfront route
Run focused mutation-seam PM workfront read-model, PM issue disposition, and pipeline integration pytest slices with SEAM_STORE_BACKEND=memory
Run packet JSON validation and git diff whitespace checks before publication
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-006 changes only the operations-web read UI and focused browser smoke. No SQL, schema migration, production data write, auth, ingress, backend endpoint, or new mutation authority is authorized.
